_README: Workspace-level Antigravity terminal permissions for the autonomous loop.
Committed so teammates + cloud agents inherit the same approvals.
IMPORTANT — verify the key names once: Antigravity does not publicly document
the exact settings.json keys. Open Settings (Ctrl+,) -> Agent -> Terminal
Execution Policy, add ONE allow entry scoped to Workspace, then reopen this
file. If the real keys differ from the guesses below, rename them to match
(and tell the maintainer). Unknown keys are ignored by Antigravity, so a wrong
guess fails safe: it prompts for commands, it never silently enables Turbo.
Prerequisite: TRUST this workspace. In Restricted Mode, approvals are saved
only to session memory and lost on reopen.
Model: policy 'off' = auto-run ONLY the allowList (prefixes). Safest.
Entries are command-prefix strings. denyList applies if you switch to 'turbo'.
This mirrors docs/agentic and the .agent/rules/50-autonomous-operation guardrails.
_allowList_tier2_optional: Uncomment into allowList ONLY if you want the loop to push its own branch
and open PRs unattended. Branch-scoped push (autopilot/* only), never main:
